title: Slightly Lighter Acacia Fence Mod
description: A mod that adds the highly requested feature Slightly Lighter Acacia Fences.
body:
A mod that finally fixes Minecraft by adding the highly requested feature: Slightly Lighter Acacia Fences.
![A Slightly Lighter Acacia Fence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae9089d0bb2a21ca1ec6e9dfb6cda6ccd138cf89.png)
Slightly Lighter Acacia Fences will spawn naturally in the world in Slightly Lighter Acacia Fence Packs of four. Upon defeating a Slightly Lighter Acacia Fence, it will drop a Slightly Lighter Acacia Fence Spawn Egg. You can use this Slightly Lighter Acacia Fence Spawn Egg to summon a Slightly Lighter Acacia Fence. That's it. That's the mod. Enjoy.
